tasks.name: Exited Employees register
tasks.body: Merged exited employees register feature to stage — backend API, Excel export, frontend screen with infinite scroll and admin/HR nav.
tasks.summary:
- Implemented backend findExitedUsers service and controller
- Added Excel export endpoint for exited employees list
- Built frontend screen with toolbar and infinite scroll
- Wired Admin/HR sidebar navigation entries
- Merged to stage

tasks.name: Exit Process UI
tasks.body: Wired RESIGNATION_VIEW_ALL and VIEW_OWN permission gates to nav and detail screen; enhanced MyExitScreen with resignation revert and F&F acknowledgment.
tasks.summary:
- Wired RESIGNATION_VIEW_ALL and VIEW_OWN to sidebar nav
- Added permission gate on exit detail screen
- Implemented resignation revert functionality on MyExitScreen
- Integrated F&F acknowledgment UI into MyExitScreen
- Merged to stage

tasks.name: Exit process backend + email
tasks.body: Implemented employee F&F acknowledgment and KT document management backend; added exit_kt_documents table and migration scripts.
tasks.summary:
- Created exit_kt_documents table migration
- Updated it_asset_requests schema
- Implemented F&F acknowledgment service and controller
- Added KT document management endpoints
- Fixed migration scripts for conditional table creation
- Merged to stage

tasks.name: Relieving letter template
tasks.body: Rewrote RelievingLetterServiceImpl.buildHtml to reproduce the Monarch relieving-letter template with correct signatory, footer, and gender-aware salutation.
tasks.summary:
- Fixed signatory to Pritesh Patel
- Added full footer block matching Monarch template
- Implemented gender-aware salutation logic
- Merged to stage

tasks.name: Fix: exit CC loading
tasks.body: Removed auto-notify on CC add; added loading states to all CC and stage buttons in both backend and frontend.
tasks.summary:
- Removed immediate notification trigger on CC recipient add
- Added loading state to CC add/remove buttons
- Added loading state to stage action buttons
- Applied fix across backend and frontend
- Merged PRs #226 (backend) and #251 (frontend)
